Registry / Terms / legally relevant software

legally relevant software

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00351 · 11 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 10 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102008OIML R 99-1:2008
#02366
3.31
any part of the software, including stored parameters, which has aninfluence on the calculated, displayed, transmitted, or stored measurement result
pending
20102007OIML R 21:2007
#00351
2.2.8.1
programs, data, type-specific and device-specific parameters that belong to the taximeter, and define or fulfill functions that are subject to legal control
pending

#01348
T.2.7.7.1
programs, data, type specific and device specific parameters that Examples of legally relevant software are: belong to the measuring instrument or module, and that define or fina fulfill functions which are subject to legal control dec wei sev
pending

#00932
T.2.8.1
programs, data, type-specific and device-specific parameters that Examples: Final results of the measurement, belong to the measuring instrument or module, and define or i.e. fulfil functions which are subject to legal control (inc iden load been
pending
202X2023OIML D031:2023
#02198
3.2.31
all software modules of measuring instrument or component that are subject to legal control
pending
202X2017OIML R061-1:2017
#03667
3.3.6.1
part of the software that is subject to legal control (VIML, 6.10)
pending
202X2011OIML R106-1:2011
#02553
0.2.8.1
program, data, type-specific and device-specific parameters that belong to the measuring instrument or device, and define or fulfill functions that are subject to legal control examples of legally relevant software are: final results of the measurement including the decimal sign and the unit, identification of the weighing range and the load receptor(s)
pending
202X2008OIML R 99-1:2008
#02367
3.31
any part of the software, including stored parameters, which has an influence on the calculated, displayed, transmitted, or stored measurement result
pending
202X2007OIML R 21:2007
#00351
2.2.8.1
programs, data, type-specific and device-specific parameters that belong to the taximeter, and define or fulfill functions that are subject to legal control
pending
202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01348
T.2.7.7.1
programs, data, type specific and device specific parameters that belong to the measuring instrument or module, and that define or fulfill functions which are subject to legal control Examples of legally relevant software are: final results of the weighing including the decimal sign and the unit, identification of the weighing range and the load receptor (if several load receptors have been used).
pending
202X2006OIML R 76-1:2006
#00932
T.2.8.1
programs, data, type-specific and device-specific parameters that belong to the measuring instrument or module, and define or fulfil functions which are subject to legal control Examples: Final results of the measurement, i.e. gross, net and tare / preset tare value (including the decimal sign and the unit), identification of the weighing range and the load receptor (if several load receptors have been used), software identification.
pending
